title: System of classified civil service
doc_html:
§2475.  System of classified civil service

There is created in the municipal government a classified civil service embracing the positions of employment, the officers, and employees of the municipal fire and police services.  The classified civil service shall be known as "the municipal fire and police civil service."
doc_text:
§2475.  System of classified civil service
There is created in the municipal government a classified civil service embracing the positions of employment, the officers, and employees of the municipal fire and police services.  The classified civil service shall be known as "the municipal fire and police civil service."
